name: sca_base_Ubuntu
description: SCA baseline — 1 Ubuntu 22.04 agent sends 207 CIS checks in ModuleFull mode (first enrollment). Verifies session completes without drops, retransmissions, or RSS spikes on the manager.
notes: Payload: sample_payloads/sca_check.json — real CIS Ubuntu 22.04 LTS check (~5.9 KB).
sync_mode=0 (ModuleFull): the manager calls deleteByQuery before inserting, like on first enrollment.
sessions_per_agent=1: one ModuleFull and exit, matching the real agent's first-sync behavior.
max_eps=0: unlimited burst — matches the real agent which sends 207 checks in ~1s (despite g_sync_max_eps=10 in code, the throttle is not strictly enforced).
Use as 1-agent reference before running multi-agent stress scenarios.
